Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DANIEL KEW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain. Claims for personal injury and emotional distress are not merely incidental. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
